sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101786" key="sfw=i+" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφῶϊ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφῶϊν</orth>, <sense id="n101786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σύ</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφωΐν</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφωέ</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
